name: loop-factory
description: Git-first autonomous loop factory for issue intake, worktree execution, agent review, verification, and PR evidence.

interface.shortDescription: Autonomous Git-first agent loops for developers
interface.longDescription: Loop Factory installs reusable docs, task packets, skills, and agent profiles so a developer can solve complex software work through coordinated issue-to-PR loops with worktrees, review passes, verifier gates, and durable GitHub evidence.
defaultPrompt: Set up Loop Factory in this repo.
Turn this requirement into an autonomous issue-to-PR loop.
